description: An elite hobgoblin who rules the warband through sheer brutality. Cut him down to win. Starts each round with 3 Shield.
An armored champion of the dead that mends itself with every blow. Destroy it to win. Starts each round with 4 Shield.
A vast slab of living obsidian that anchors the legion. Bring it down to win. Slow, but starts each round with 8 Shield.
Warchief of the entire goblin horde — monstrous and merciless. Slay him to win the battle. Starts each round with 4 Shield.
The deathless sovereign of the undead, knitting his bones whole with every strike. Destroy him to win. Starts each round with 5 Shield.
A mountain that walks — the eldest of the stoneborn. Bring it down to win. Immensely slow, but starts each round with 10 Shield.
